description: A Technology Radar diagram is needed for the Q4 Engineering Review. Using the blank radar template (~/Diagrams/tech_radar_template.drawio) and the technology assessment data (~/Desktop/tech_assessment_Q4_2024.txt), populate the diagram with the 20 listed technologies. Each technology must be represented by a labeled shape placed in its designated Quadrant (Techniques, Tools, Platforms, Languages) and Ring (Adopt, Trial, Assess, Hold) as specified in the data file. Apply fill colors based on the 'Movement' status: New (Green #00CC00), Moved In (Blue #3399FF), Moved Out (Orange #FF9900), and No Change (Gray #CCCCCC). Include a legend explaining these four colors. Export the final diagram as a PNG image to ~/Diagrams/exports/tech_radar_Q4_2024.png. Items must be clearly positioned within their designated sector and ring.
